name: Microsoft Azure Compute
description: This app implements virtualization actions for Microsoft Azure Virtual Machines

actions.name: Generate Token
actions.description: Generates a token

actions.name: Get System Info
actions.description: Get information about a VM

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: vm_name
parameters.description: The name of the virtual machine

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: List Vms
actions.description: Get the list of registered VMs

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: Name of the resource group

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Snapshot Vm
actions.description: Take a snapshot of the VM

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: snapshot_name
parameters.description: The name of the snapshot that is being created. The name can't be changed after the snapshot is created. Supported characters for the name are a-z, A-Z, 0-9, and _. The max name length is 80 characters

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Resource location

parameters.name: create_option
parameters.description: Source for disk's creation

parameters.name: source_resource_id
parameters.description: If create_option is Copy, this is the ARM ID of the source snapshot or disk

parameters.name: source_uri
parameters.description: If create_option is Import, this is the URI of a blob to be imported into a managed disk

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Start Vm
actions.description: Start a stopped or suspended VM

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: vm_name
parameters.description: The name of the virtual machine

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Stop Vm
actions.description: Stop a VM

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: vm_name
parameters.description: The name of the virtual machine

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Delete Vm
actions.description: Delete a VM

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: vm_name
parameters.description: The name of the virtual machine

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Deallocate Vm
actions.description: Shut down the virtual machine and release the compute resources. You are not billed for the compute resource that this virtual machine uses

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: vm_name
parameters.description: The name of the virtual machine

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: List Tags
actions.description: Get the names and values of all resource tags that are defined in the subscription

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Create Tag
actions.description: Create or update a tag

parameters.name: tag_name
parameters.description: The name of the tag

parameters.name: tag_value
parameters.description: The value of the tag to create or update

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: List Resource Groups
actions.description: Get the list of resource groups for the subscription

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: List Snapshots
actions.description: Get the list of snapshots under the subscription

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: List Security Groups
actions.description: Get the list of all security groups in a resource group

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: group_type
parameters.description: Type of security group to query

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Add Network Group
actions.description: Add a network security group in a resource group

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: group_name
parameters.description: Name of security group to add

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Resource location

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: String object of resource tags

parameters.name: default_security_rules
parameters.description: Comma separated list of default security rules for the network security group

parameters.name: provisioning_state
parameters.description: The provisioning state of the public IP resource

parameters.name: resource_guid
parameters.description: The resource GUID property of the network security group resource

parameters.name: security_rules
parameters.description: Comma separated list of security rules of the network security group

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Add Application Group
actions.description: Add an application security groups in a resource group

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: group_name
parameters.description: Name of security group to add

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Resource location

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: String object of resource tags. It should be in JSON format

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: List Virtual Networks
actions.description: Get the list of virtual networks

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: List Subnets
actions.description: Get the list of subnets

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: virtual_network_name
parameters.description: The name of the virtual network

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Get Ip Availability
actions.description: Check if a private IP address is available for use

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: virtual_network_name
parameters.description: The name of the virtual network

parameters.name: ip_address
parameters.description: The private IP address to be verified

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Generalize Vm
actions.description: Set the state of the virtual machine to be generalized

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: vm_name
parameters.description: The name of the virtual machine

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Redeploy Vm
actions.description: Redeploy a virtual machine

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: vm_name
parameters.description: The name of the virtual machine

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Run Command
actions.description: Run a command on the virtual machine

parameters.name: resource_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group

parameters.name: vm_name
parameters.description: The name of the virtual machine

parameters.name: command_id
parameters.description: The command to run against the VM

parameters.name: script
parameters.description: The script to be executed. When this value is given, the given script will override the default script of the command

parameters.name: script_parameters
parameters.description: The run command parameters

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value

actions.name: Get Results
actions.description: Fetch the results of a previously executed run_command action

parameters.name: results_url
parameters.description: URL to fetch result of run command

parameters.name: subscription_id
parameters.description: Subscription ID to overwrite asset configuration value
